currentClaim: State Boundary Contract v1 已 accepted：状态边界已成为 domain contract、架构文档和 skill runtime contract 的共同约束，下一刀可以在此基础上实现 handoff packet generator。

doneWhenChecklist.label: packages/domain/src/stateBoundary.ts 定义状态层级、authority、write mode、role rule 与 external agent 默认边界
stateBoundary.test.ts 覆盖 committed truth 权威、derived packet 非权威、external agent proposal、verifier/closeout evidence gate
docs/architecture/threadsmith-truth-boundary.md 已对齐 project constitution / committed truth / derived packet / evidence / audit / runtime artifact
codex/skills/threadsmith/references/runtime-contract.md 与 verify:skill-contract 已锁住状态边界和角色写入边界
project truth schema、domain tests、skill contract、diff hygiene 与 JSON 校验需保持通过

knownGaps: 本阶段只实现 State Boundary Contract，不生成 handoff packet。
外部 agent 仍默认只读 + writeback proposal；直接写 committed truth 继续保留为未来 opt-in 问题。
前端继续冻结；本阶段不展示状态边界 UI。
